posts.caption:
Sellers are quietly winning in Clementi 📈

The median resale flat there is now $598k — up 3.9% over the year, across 713 sales. If you're holding here, you've got leverage. If you're buying, move with your eyes open.

The full read on what it means for your move is on the site — link in bio.

#singaporeproperty #clementi #hdbresale #sgpropertymarket #propertysg #sghome

You might be leaving money on the table. 👀

First-timer families can receive up to $80k from the CPF Housing Grant alone — and that's before EHG, Proximity or EC grants stack on top. Most buyers never check what they actually qualify for.

Check your grants in 30 seconds, free — link in bio.

posts.caption:
Want priority at Haig Girls'? 📍

Live within 1km and your child gets first dibs in the P1 ballot — and right now 169+ homes qualify. See every one, and check any school, free.
